47\u2192\\tinternalapi \\\"k8s.io/cri-api/pkg/apis\\\"\\n    48\u2192\\tpluginwatcherapi \\\"k8s.io/kubelet/pkg/apis/pluginregistration/v1\\\"\\n    49\u2192\\tpodresourcesapi \\\"k8s.io/kubelet/pkg/apis/podresources/v1\\\"\\n    50\u2192\\tkubefeatures \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/features\\\"\\n    51\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/cadvisor\\\"\\n    52\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/cm/cpumanager\\\"\\n    53\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager\\\"\\n    54\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/cm/dra\\\"\\n    55\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/cm/memorymanager\\\"\\n    56\u2192\\tmemorymanagerstate \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/cm/memorymanager/state\\\"\\n    57\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/cm/resourceupdates\\\"\\n    58\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/cm/topologymanager\\\"\\n    59\u2192\\tcmutil \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/cm/util\\\"\\n    60\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/config\\\"\\n    61\u2192\\tkubecontainer \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/container\\\"\\n    62\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/events\\\"\\n    63\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/lifecycle\\\"\\n    64\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/metrics\\\"\\n    65\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/pluginmanager/cache\\\"\\n    66\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/stats/pidlimit\\\"\\n    67\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/status\\\"\\n    68\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/util/swap\\\"\\n    69\u2192\\tschedulerframework \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/framework\\\"\\n    70\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/util/oom\\\"\\n    71\u2192)\\n    72\u2192\\n    73\u2192// A non-user container tracked by the Kubelet.\\n    74\u2192type systemContainer struct {\\n    75\u2192\\t// Absolute name of the container.\\n    76\u2192\\tname string\\n    77\u2192\\n    78\u2192\\t// CPU limit in millicores.\\n    79\u2192\\tcpuMillicores int64\\n    80\u2192\\n    81\u2192\\t// Function that ensures the state of the container.\\n    82\u2192\\t// m is the cgroup manager for the specified container.\\n    83\u2192\\tensureStateFunc func(m cgroups.Manager) error\\n    84\u2192\\n    85\u2192\\t// Manager for the cgroups of the external container.\\n    86\u2192\\tmanager cgroups.Manager\\n    87\u2192}\\n    88\u2192\\n    89\u2192func newSystemCgroups(containerName string) (*systemContainer, error) {\\n    90\u2192\\tmanager, err := createManager(containerName)\\n    91\u2192\\tif err != nil {\\n    92\u2192\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n    93\u2192\\t}\\n    94\u2192\\treturn &systemContainer{\\n    95\u2192\\t\\tname:    containerName,\\n    96\u2192\\t\\tmanager: manager,\\n    97\u2192\\t}, nil\\n    98\u2192}\\n    99\u2192\\n   100\u2192type containerManagerImpl struct {\\n   101\u2192\\tsync.RWMutex\\n   102\u2192\\tcadvisorInterface cadvisor.Interface\\n   103\u2192\\tmountUtil         mount.Interface\\n   104\u2192\\tNodeConfig\\n   105\u2192\\tstatus Status\\n   106\u2192\\t// External containers being managed.\\n   107\u2192\\tsystemContainers []*systemContainer\\n   108\u2192\\t// Tasks that are run periodically\\n   109\u2192\\tperiodicTasks []func()\\n   110\u2192\\t// Holds all the mounted cgroup subsystems\\n   111\u2192\\tsubsystems *CgroupSubsystems\\n   112\u2192\\tnodeInfo   *v1.Node\\n   113\u2192\\t// Interface for cgroup management\\n   114\u2192\\tcgroupManager CgroupManager\\n   115\u2192\\t// Capacity of this node.\\n   116\u2192\\tcapacity v1.ResourceList\\n   117\u2192\\t// Capacity of this node, including internal resources.\\n   118\u2192\\tinternalCapacity v1.ResourceList\\n   119\u2192\\t// Absolute cgroupfs path to a cgroup that Kubelet needs to place all pods under.\\n   120\u2192\\t// This path include a top level container for enforcing Node Allocatable.\\n   121\u2192\\tcgroupRoot CgroupName\\n   122\u2192\\t// Event recorder interface.\\n   123\u2192\\trecorder record.EventRecorder\\n   124\u2192\\t// Interface for QoS cgroup management\\n   125\u2192\\tqosContainerManager QOSContainerManager\\n   126\u2192\\t// Interface for exporting and allocating devices reported by device plugins.\\n   127\u2192\\tdeviceManager devicemanager.Manager\\n   128\u2192\\t// Interface for CPU affinity management.\\n   129\u2192\\tcpuManager cpumanager.Manager\\n   130\u2192\\t// Interface for memory affinity management.\\n   131\u2192\\tmemoryManager memorymanager.Manager\\n   132\u2192\\t// Interface for Topology resource co-ordination\\n   133\u2192\\ttopologyManager topologymanager.Manager\\n   134\u2192\\t// Implementation of Dynamic Resource Allocation (DRA).\\n   135\u2192\\tdraManager *dra.Manager\\n   136\u2192\\t// kubeClient is the interface to the Kubernetes API server. May be nil if the kubelet is running in standalone mode.\\n   137\u2192\\tkubeClient clientset.Interface\\n   138\u2192\\t// resourceUpdates is a channel that provides resource updates.\\n   139\u2192\\tresourceUpdates chan resourceupdates.Update\\n   140\u2192}\\n   141\u2192\\n   142\u2192type features struct {\\n   143\u2192\\tcpuHardcapping bool\\n   144\u2192}\\n   145\u2192\\n   146\u2192var _ ContainerManager = &containerManagerImpl{}\\n   147\u2192\\n   148\u2192// checks if the required cgroups subsystems are mounted.\\n   149\u2192// As of now, only 'cpu' and 'memory' are required.\\n   150\u2192// cpu quota is a soft requirement.\\n   151\u2192func validateSystemRequirements(logger klog.Logger, mountUtil mount.Interface) (features, error) {\\n   152\u2192\\tconst (\\n   153\u2192\\t\\tcgroupMountType = \\\"cgroup\\\"\\n   154\u2192\\t\\tlocalErr        = \\\"system validation failed\\\"\\n   155\u2192\\t)\\n   156\u2192\\tvar (\\n   157\u2192\\t\\tcpuMountPoint string\\n   158\u2192\\t\\tf             features\\n   159\u2192\\t)\\n   160\u2192\\tmountPoints, err := mountUtil.List()\\n   161\u2192\\tif err != nil {\\n   162\u2192\\t\\treturn f, fmt.Errorf(\\\"%s - %v\\\", localErr, err)\\n   163\u2192\\t}\\n   164\u2192\\n   165\u2192\\tif cgroups.IsCgroup2UnifiedMode() {\\n   166\u2192\\t\\tf.cpuHardcapping = true\\n   167\u2192\\t\\treturn f, nil\\n   168\u2192\\t}\\n   169\u2192\\n   170\u2192\\texpectedCgroups := sets.New(\\\"cpu\\\", \\\"cpuacct\\\", \\\"cpuset\\\", \\\"memory\\\")\\n   171\u2192\\tfor _, mountPoint := range mountPoints {\\n   172\u2192\\t\\tif mountPoint.Type == cgroupMountType {\\n   173\u2192\\t\\t\\tfor _, opt := range mountPoint.Opts {\\n   174\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\tif expectedCgroups.Has(opt) {\\n   175\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t\\texpectedCgroups.Delete(opt)\\n   176\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n   177\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\tif opt == \\\"cpu\\\" {\\n   178\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tcpuMountPoint = mountPoint.Path\\n   179\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n   180\u2192\\t\\t\\t}\\n   181\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   182\u2192\\t}\\n   183\u2192\\n   184\u2192\\tif expectedCgroups.Len() > 0 {\\n   185\u2192\\t\\treturn f, fmt.Errorf(\\\"%s - Following Cgroup subsystem not mounted: %v\\\", localErr, sets.List(expectedCgroups))\\n   186\u2192\\t}\\n   187\u2192\\n   188\u2192\\t// Check if cpu quota is available.\\n   189\u2192\\t// CPU cgroup is required and so it expected to be mounted at this point.\\n   190\u2192\\tperiodExists, err := utilpath.Exists(utilpath.CheckFollowSymlink, path.Join(cpuMountPoint, \\\"cpu.cfs_period_us\\\"))\\n   191\u2192\\tif err != nil {\\n   192\u2192\\t\\tlogger.Error(err, \\\"Failed to detect if CPU cgroup cpu.cfs_period_us is available\\\")\\n   193\u2192\\t}\\n   194\u2192\\tquotaExists, err := utilpath.Exists(utilpath.CheckFollowSymlink, path.Join(cpuMountPoint, \\\"cpu.cfs_quota_us\\\"))\\n   195\u2192\\tif err != nil {\\n   196\u2192\\t\\tlogger.Error(err, \\\"Failed to detect if CPU cgroup cpu.cfs_quota_us is available\\\")\\n   197\u2192\\t}\\n   198\u2192\\tif quotaExists && periodExists {\\n   199\u2192\\t\\tf.cpuHardcapping = true\\n   200\u2192\\t}\\n   201\u2192\\treturn f, nil\\n   202\u2192}\\n   203\u2192\\n   204\u2192// TODO(vmarmol): Add limits to the system containers.\\n   205\u2192// Takes the absolute name of the specified containers.\\n   206\u2192// Empty container name disables use of the specified container.\\n   207\u2192func NewContainerManager(ctx context.Context, mountUtil mount.Interface, cadvisorInterface cadvisor.Interface, nodeConfig NodeConfig, failSwapOn bool, recorder record.EventRecorder, kubeClient clientset.Interface) (ContainerManager, error) {\\n   208\u2192\\tlogger := klog.FromContext(ctx)\\n   209\u2192\\n   210\u2192\\tsubsystems, err := GetCgroupSubsystems()\\n   211\u2192\\tif err != nil {\\n   212\u2192\\t\\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\\\"failed to get mounted cgroup subsystems: %v\\\", err)\\n   213\u2192\\t}\\n   214\u2192\\n   215\u2192\\tisSwapOn, err := swap.IsSwapOn()\\n   216\u2192\\tif err != nil {\\n   217\u2192\\t\\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\\\"failed to determine if swap is on: %w\\\", err)\\n   218\u2192\\t}\\n   219\u2192\\n   220\u2192\\tif isSwapOn {\\n   221\u2192\\t\\tif failSwapOn {\\n   222\u2192\\t\\t\\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\\\"running with swap on is not supported, please disable swap or set --fail-swap-on flag to false\\\")\\n   223\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   224\u2192\\n   225\u2192\\t\\tif !swap.IsTmpfsNoswapOptionSupported(mountUtil, nodeConfig.KubeletRootDir) {\\n   226\u2192\\t\\t\\tnodeRef := nodeRefFromNode(string(nodeConfig.NodeName))\\n   227\u2192\\t\\t\\trecorder.Event(nodeRef, v1.EventTypeWarning, events.PossibleMemoryBackedVolumesOnDisk,\\n   228\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"The tmpfs noswap option is not supported. Memory-backed volumes (e.g. secrets, emptyDirs, etc.) \\\"+\\n   229\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"might be swapped to disk and should no longer be considered secure.\\\",\\n   230\u2192\\t\\t\\t)\\n   231\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   232\u2192\\t}\\n   233\u2192\\n   234\u2192\\tvar internalCapacity = v1.ResourceList{}\\n   235\u2192\\t// It is safe to invoke `MachineInfo` on cAdvisor before logically initializing cAdvisor here because\\n   236\u2192\\t// machine info is computed and cached once as part of cAdvisor object creation.\\n   237\u2192\\t// But `RootFsInfo` and `ImagesFsInfo` are not available at this moment so they will be called later during manager starts\\n   238\u2192\\tmachineInfo, err := cadvisorInterface.MachineInfo()\\n   239\u2192\\tif err != nil {\\n   240\u2192\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n   241\u2192\\t}\\n   242\u2192\\tcapacity := cadvisor.CapacityFromMachineInfo(machineInfo)\\n   243\u2192\\tfor k, v := range capacity {\\n   244\u2192\\t\\tinternalCapacity[k] = v\\n   245\u2192\\t}\\n   246\u2192\\tpidlimits, err := pidlimit.Stats()\\n   247\u2192\\tif err == nil && pidlimits != nil && pidlimits.MaxPID != nil {\\n   248\u2192\\t\\tinternalCapacity[pidlimit.PIDs] = *resource.NewQuantity(\\n   249\u2192\\t\\t\\tint64(*pidlimits.MaxPID),\\n   250\u2192\\t\\t\\tresource.DecimalSI)\\n   251\u2192\\t}\\n   252\u2192\\n   253\u2192\\t// Turn CgroupRoot from a string (in cgroupfs path format) to internal CgroupName\\n   254\u2192\\tcgroupRoot := ParseCgroupfsToCgroupName(nodeConfig.CgroupRoot)\\n   255\u2192\\tcgroupManager := NewCgroupManager(logger, subsystems, nodeConfig.CgroupDriver)\\n   256\u2192\\tnodeConfig.CgroupVersion = cgroupManager.Version()\\n   257\u2192\\t// Check if Cgroup-root actually exists on the node\\n   258\u2192\\tif nodeConfig.CgroupsPerQOS {\\n   259\u2192\\t\\t// this does default to / when enabled, but this tests against regressions.\\n   260\u2192\\t\\tif nodeConfig.CgroupRoot == \\\"\\\" {\\n   261\u2192\\t\\t\\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\\\"invalid configuration: cgroups-per-qos was specified and cgroup-root was not specified. To enable the QoS cgroup hierarchy you need to specify a valid cgroup-root\\\")\\n   262\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   263\u2192\\n   264\u2192\\t\\t// we need to check that the cgroup root actually exists for each subsystem\\n   265\u2192\\t\\t// of note, we always use the cgroupfs driver when performing this check since\\n   266\u2192\\t\\t// the input is provided in that format.\\n   267\u2192\\t\\t// this is important because we do not want any name conversion to occur.\\n   268\u2192\\t\\tif err := cgroupManager.Validate(cgroupRoot); err != nil {\\n   269\u2192\\t\\t\\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\\\"invalid configuration: %w\\\", err)\\n   270\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   271\u2192\\t\\tlogger.Info(\\\"Container manager verified user specified cgroup-root exists\\\", \\\"cgroupRoot\\\", cgroupRoot)\\n   272\u2192\\t\\t// Include the top level cgroup for enforcing node allocatable into cgroup-root.\\n   273\u2192\\t\\t// This way, all sub modules can avoid having to understand the concept of node allocatable.\\n   274\u2192\\t\\tcgroupRoot = NewCgroupName(cgroupRoot, defaultNodeAllocatableCgroupName)\\n   275\u2192\\t}\\n   276\u2192\\tlogger.Info(\\\"Creating Container Manager object based on Node Config\\\", \\\"nodeConfig\\\", nodeConfig)\\n   277\u2192\\n   278\u2192\\tqosContainerManager, err := NewQOSContainerManager(subsystems, cgroupRoot, nodeConfig, cgroupManager)\\n   279\u2192\\tif err != nil {\\n   280\u2192\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n   281\u2192\\t}\\n   282\u2192\\n   283\u2192\\tcm := &containerManagerImpl{\\n   284\u2192\\t\\tcadvisorInterface:   cadvisorInterface,\\n   285\u2192\\t\\tmountUtil:           mountUtil,\\n   286\u2192\\t\\tNodeConfig:          nodeConfig,\\n   287\u2192\\t\\tsubsystems:          subsystems,\\n   288\u2192\\t\\tcgroupManager:       cgroupManager,\\n   289\u2192\\t\\tcapacity:            capacity,\\n   290\u2192\\t\\tinternalCapacity:    internalCapacity,\\n   291\u2192\\t\\tcgroupRoot:          cgroupRoot,\\n   292\u2192\\t\\trecorder:            recorder,\\n   293\u2192\\t\\tqosContainerManager: qosContainerManager,\\n   294\u2192\\t}\\n   295\u2192\\n   296\u2192\\tcm.topologyManager, err = topologymanager.NewManager(\\n   297\u2192\\t\\tmachineInfo.Topology,\\n   298\u2192\\t\\tnodeConfig.TopologyManagerPolicy,\\n   299\u2192\\t\\tnodeConfig.TopologyManagerScope,\\n   300\u2192\\t\\tnodeConfig.TopologyManagerPolicyOptions,\\n   301\u2192\\t)\\n   302\u2192\\n   303\u2192\\tif err != nil {\\n   304\u2192\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n   305\u2192\\t}\\n   306\u2192\\n   307\u2192\\tlogger.Info(\\\"Creating device plugin manager\\\")\\n   308\u2192\\tcm.deviceManager, err = devicemanager.NewManagerImpl(machineInfo.Topology, cm.topologyManager)\\n   309\u2192\\tif err != nil {\\n   310\u2192\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n   311\u2192\\t}\\n   312\u2192\\tcm.topologyManager.AddHintProvider(logger, cm.deviceManager)\\n   313\u2192\\n   314\u2192\\t// Initialize DRA manager\\n   315\u2192\\tif utilfeature.DefaultFeatureGate.Enabled(kubefeatures.DynamicResourceAllocation) {\\n   316\u2192\\t\\tlogger.Info(\\\"Creating Dynamic Resource Allocation (DRA) manager\\\")\\n   317\u2192\\t\\tcm.draManager, err = dra.NewManager(logger, kubeClient, nodeConfig.KubeletRootDir)\\n   318\u2192\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n   319\u2192\\t\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n   320\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   321\u2192\\t\\tmetrics.RegisterCollectors(cm.draManager.NewMetricsCollector())\\n   322\u2192\\t}\\n   323\u2192\\tcm.kubeClient = kubeClient\\n   324\u2192\\n   325\u2192\\t// Initialize CPU manager\\n   326\u2192\\tcm.cpuManager, err = cpumanager.NewManager(\\n   327\u2192\\t\\tlogger,\\n   328\u2192\\t\\tnodeConfig.CPUManagerPolicy,\\n   329\u2192\\t\\tnodeConfig.CPUManagerPolicyOptions,\\n   330\u2192\\t\\tnodeConfig.CPUManagerReconcilePeriod,\\n   331\u2192\\t\\tmachineInfo,\\n   332\u2192\\t\\tnodeConfig.NodeAllocatableConfig.ReservedSystemCPUs,\\n   333\u2192\\t\\tcm.GetNodeAllocatableReservation(),\\n   334\u2192\\t\\tnodeConfig.KubeletRootDir,\\n   335\u2192\\t\\tcm.topologyManager,\\n   336\u2192\\t)\\n   337\u2192\\tif err != nil {\\n   338\u2192\\t\\tlogger.Error(err, \\\"Failed to initialize cpu manager\\\")\\n   339\u2192\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n   340\u2192\\t}\\n   341\u2192\\tcm.topologyManager.AddHintProvider(logger, cm.cpuManager)\\n   342\u2192\\n   343\u2192\\tcm.memoryManager, err = memorymanager.NewManager(\\n   344\u2192\\t\\tlogger,\\n   345\u2192\\t\\tnodeConfig.MemoryManagerPolicy,\\n   346\u2192\\t\\tmachineInfo,\\n   347\u2192\\t\\tcm.GetNodeAllocatableReservation(),\\n   348\u2192\\t\\tnodeConfig.MemoryManagerReservedMemory,\\n   349\u2192\\t\\tnodeConfig.KubeletRootDir,\\n   350\u2192\\t\\tcm.topologyManager,\\n   351\u2192\\t)\\n   352\u2192\\tif err != nil {\\n   353\u2192\\t\\tlogger.Error(err, \\\"Failed to initialize memory manager\\\")\\n   354\u2192\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n   355\u2192\\t}\\n   356\u2192\\tcm.topologyManager.AddHintProvider(logger, cm.memoryManager)\\n   357\u2192\\n   358\u2192\\t// Create a single channel for all resource updates. This channel is consumed\\n   359\u2192\\t// by the Kubelet's main sync loop.\\n   360\u2192\\tcm.resourceUpdates = make(chan resourceupdates.Update, 10)\\n   361\u2192\\n   362\u2192\\t// Start goroutines to fan-in updates from the various sub-managers\\n   363\u2192\\t// (e.g., device manager, DRA manager) into the single updates channel.\\n   364\u2192\\tvar wg sync.WaitGroup\\n   365\u2192\\tsources := map[string]<-chan resourceupdates.Update{}\\n   366\u2192\\tif cm.deviceManager != nil {\\n   367\u2192\\t\\tsources[\\\"deviceManager\\\"] = cm.deviceManager.Updates()\\n   368\u2192\\t}\\n   369\u2192\\tif utilfeature.DefaultFeatureGate.Enabled(kubefeatures.DynamicResourceAllocation) && cm.draManager != nil {\\n   370\u2192\\t\\tif utilfeature.DefaultFeatureGate.Enabled(kubefeatures.ResourceHealthStatus) {\\n   371\u2192\\t\\t\\tsources[\\\"draManager\\\"] = cm.draManager.Updates()\\n   372\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   373\u2192\\t}\\n   374\u2192\\n   375\u2192\\tfor name, ch := range sources {\\n   376\u2192\\t\\twg.Add(1)\\n   377\u2192\\t\\tgo func(name string, c <-chan resourceupdates.Update) {\\n   378\u2192\\t\\t\\tdefer wg.Done()\\n   379\u2192\\t\\t\\tfor v := range c {\\n   380\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\tlogger.V(4).Info(\\\"Container Manager: forwarding resource update\\\", \\\"source\\\", name, \\\"pods\\\", v.PodUIDs)\\n   381\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\tcm.resourceUpdates <- v\\n   382\u2192\\t\\t\\t}\\n   383\u2192\\t\\t}(name, ch)\\n   384\u2192\\t}\\n   385\u2192\\n   386\u2192\\tgo func() {\\n   387\u2192\\t\\twg.Wait()\\n   388\u2192\\t\\tclose(cm.resourceUpdates)\\n   389\u2192\\t}()\\n   390\u2192\\n   391\u2192\\treturn cm, nil\\n   392\u2192}\\n   393\u2192\\n   394\u2192// NewPodContainerManager is a factory method returns a PodContainerManager object\\n   395\u2192// If qosCgroups are enabled then it returns the general pod container manager\\n   396\u2192// otherwise it returns a no-op manager which essentially does nothing\\n   397\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) NewPodContainerManager() PodContainerManager {\\n   398\u2192\\tif cm.NodeConfig.CgroupsPerQOS {\\n   399\u2192\\t\\treturn &podContainerManagerImpl{\\n   400\u2192\\t\\t\\tqosContainersInfo: cm.GetQOSContainersInfo(),\\n   401\u2192\\t\\t\\tsubsystems:        cm.subsystems,\\n   402\u2192\\t\\t\\tcgroupManager:     cm.cgroupManager,\\n   403\u2192\\t\\t\\tpodPidsLimit:      cm.PodPidsLimit,\\n   404\u2192\\t\\t\\tenforceCPULimits:  cm.EnforceCPULimits,\\n   405\u2192\\t\\t\\t// cpuCFSQuotaPeriod is in microseconds. NodeConfig.CPUCFSQuotaPeriod is time.Duration (measured in nano seconds).\\n   406\u2192\\t\\t\\t// Convert (cm.CPUCFSQuotaPeriod) [nanoseconds] / time.Microsecond (1000) to get cpuCFSQuotaPeriod in microseconds.\\n   407\u2192\\t\\t\\tcpuCFSQuotaPeriod:   uint64(cm.CPUCFSQuotaPeriod / time.Microsecond),\\n   408\u2192\\t\\t\\tpodContainerManager: cm,\\n   409\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   410\u2192\\t}\\n   411\u2192\\treturn &podContainerManagerNoop{\\n   412\u2192\\t\\tcgroupRoot: cm.cgroupRoot,\\n   413\u2192\\t}\\n   414\u2192}\\n   415\u2192\\n   416\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) PodHasExclusiveCPUs(pod *v1.Pod) bool {\\n   417\u2192\\t// Use klog.TODO() because we currently do not have a proper logger to pass in.\\n   418\u2192\\t// Replace this with an appropriate logger when refactoring this function to accept a logger parameter.\\n   419\u2192\\tlogger := klog.TODO()\\n   420\u2192\\treturn podHasExclusiveCPUs(logger, cm.cpuManager, pod)\\n   421\u2192}\\n   422\u2192\\n   423\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) ContainerHasExclusiveCPUs(pod *v1.Pod, container *v1.Container) bool {\\n   424\u2192\\t// Use klog.TODO() because we currently do not have a proper logger to pass in.\\n   425\u2192\\t// Replace this with an appropriate logger when refactoring this function to accept a logger parameter.\\n   426\u2192\\tlogger := klog.TODO()\\n   427\u2192\\treturn containerHasExclusiveCPUs(logger, cm.cpuManager, pod, container)\\n   428\u2192}\\n   429\u2192\\n   430\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) InternalContainerLifecycle() InternalContainerLifecycle {\\n   431\u2192\\treturn &internalContainerLifecycleImpl{cm.cpuManager, cm.memoryManager, cm.topologyManager}\\n   432\u2192}\\n   433\u2192\\n   434\u2192// Create a cgroup container manager.\\n   435\u2192func createManager(containerName string) (cgroups.Manager, error) {\\n   436\u2192\\tcg := &cgroups.Cgroup{\\n   437\u2192\\t\\tParent: \\\"/\\\",\\n   438\u2192\\t\\tName:   containerName,\\n   439\u2192\\t\\tResources: &cgroups.Resources{\\n   440\u2192\\t\\t\\tSkipDevices: true,\\n   441\u2192\\t\\t},\\n   442\u2192\\t\\tSystemd: false,\\n   443\u2192\\t}\\n   444\u2192\\n   445\u2192\\treturn manager.New(cg)\\n   446\u2192}\\n   447\u2192\\n   448\u2192type KernelTunableBehavior string\\n   449\u2192\\n   450\u2192const (\\n   451\u2192\\tKernelTunableWarn   KernelTunableBehavior = \\\"warn\\\"\\n   452\u2192\\tKernelTunableError  KernelTunableBehavior = \\\"error\\\"\\n   453\u2192\\tKernelTunableModify KernelTunableBehavior = \\\"modify\\\"\\n   454\u2192)\\n   455\u2192\\n   456\u2192// setupKernelTunables validates kernel tunable flags are set as expected\\n   457\u2192// depending upon the specified option, it will either warn, error, or modify the kernel tunable flags\\n   458\u2192func setupKernelTunables(logger klog.Logger, option KernelTunableBehavior) error {\\n   459\u2192\\tdesiredState := map[string]int{\\n   460\u2192\\t\\tutilsysctl.VMOvercommitMemory: utilsysctl.VMOvercommitMemoryAlways,\\n   461\u2192\\t\\tutilsysctl.VMPanicOnOOM:       utilsysctl.VMPanicOnOOMInvokeOOMKiller,\\n   462\u2192\\t\\tutilsysctl.KernelPanic:        utilsysctl.KernelPanicRebootTimeout,\\n   463\u2192\\t\\tutilsysctl.KernelPanicOnOops:  utilsysctl.KernelPanicOnOopsAlways,\\n   464\u2192\\t\\tutilsysctl.RootMaxKeys:        utilsysctl.RootMaxKeysSetting,\\n   465\u2192\\t\\tutilsysctl.RootMaxBytes:       utilsysctl.RootMaxBytesSetting,\\n   466\u2192\\t}\\n   467\u2192\\n   468\u2192\\tsysctl := utilsysctl.New()\\n   469\u2192\\n   470\u2192\\terrList := []error{}\\n   471\u2192\\tfor flag, expectedValue := range desiredState {\\n   472\u2192\\t\\tval, err := sysctl.GetSysctl(flag)\\n   473\u2192\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n   474\u2192\\t\\t\\terrList = append(errList, err)\\n   475\u2192\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n   476\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   477\u2192\\t\\tif val == expectedValue {\\n   478\u2192\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n   479\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   480\u2192\\n   481\u2192\\t\\tswitch option {\\n   482\u2192\\t\\tcase KernelTunableError:\\n   483\u2192\\t\\t\\terrList = append(errList, fmt.Errorf(\\\"invalid kernel flag: %v, expected value: %v, actual value: %v\\\", flag, expectedValue, val))\\n   484\u2192\\t\\tcase KernelTunableWarn:\\n   485\u2192\\t\\t\\tlogger.V(2).Info(\\\"Invalid kernel flag\\\", \\\"flag\\\", flag, \\\"expectedValue\\\", expectedValue, \\\"actualValue\\\", val)\\n   486\u2192\\t\\tcase KernelTunableModify:\\n   487\u2192\\t\\t\\tlogger.V(2).Info(\\\"Updating kernel flag\\\", \\\"flag\\\", flag, \\\"expectedValue\\\", expectedValue, \\\"actualValue\\\", val)\\n   488\u2192\\t\\t\\terr = sysctl.SetSysctl(flag, expectedValue)\\n   489\u2192\\t\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n   490\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\tif inuserns.RunningInUserNS() {\\n   491\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif utilfeature.DefaultFeatureGate.Enabled(kubefeatures.KubeletInUserNamespace) {\\n   492\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tlogger.V(2).Info(\\\"Updating kernel flag failed (running in UserNS, ignoring)\\\", \\\"flag\\\", flag, \\\"err\\\", err)\\n   493\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n   494\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n   495\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tlogger.Error(err, \\\"Updating kernel flag failed (Hint: enable KubeletInUserNamespace feature flag to ignore the error)\\\", \\\"flag\\\", flag)\\n   496\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n   497\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\terrList = append(errList, err)\\n   498\u2192\\t\\t\\t}\\n   499\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   500\u2192\\t}\\n   501\u2192\\treturn utilerrors.NewAggregate(errList)\\n   502\u2192}\\n   503\u2192\\n   504\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) setupNode(ctx context.Context, activePods ActivePodsFunc) error {\\n   505\u2192\\tlogger := klog.FromContext(ctx)\\n   506\u2192\\n   507\u2192\\tf, err := validateSystemRequirements(logger, cm.mountUtil)\\n   508\u2192\\tif err != nil {\\n   509\u2192\\t\\treturn err\\n   510\u2192\\t}\\n   511\u2192\\tif !f.cpuHardcapping {\\n   512\u2192\\t\\tcm.status.SoftRequirements = fmt.Errorf(\\\"CPU hardcapping unsupported\\\")\\n   513\u2192\\t}\\n   514\u2192\\tb := KernelTunableModify\\n   515\u2192\\tif cm.GetNodeConfig().ProtectKernelDefaults {\\n   516\u2192\\t\\tb = KernelTunableError\\n   517\u2192\\t}\\n   518\u2192\\tif err := setupKernelTunables(logger, b); err != nil {\\n   519\u2192\\t\\treturn err\\n   520\u2192\\t}\\n   521\u2192\\n   522\u2192\\t// Setup top level qos containers only if CgroupsPerQOS flag is specified as true\\n   523\u2192\\tif cm.NodeConfig.CgroupsPerQOS {\\n   524\u2192\\t\\tif err := cm.createNodeAllocatableCgroups(logger); err != nil {\\n   525\u2192\\t\\t\\treturn err\\n   526\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   527\u2192\\t\\terr = cm.qosContainerManager.Start(ctx, cm.GetNodeAllocatableAbsolute, activePods)\\n   528\u2192\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n   529\u2192\\t\\t\\treturn fmt.Errorf(\\\"failed to initialize top level QOS containers: %v\\\", err)\\n   530\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   531\u2192\\t}\\n   532\u2192\\n   533\u2192\\t// Enforce Node Allocatable (if required)\\n   534\u2192\\tif err := cm.enforceNodeAllocatableCgroups(logger); err != nil {\\n   535\u2192\\t\\treturn err\\n   536\u2192\\t}\\n   537\u2192\\n   538\u2192\\tsystemContainers := []*systemContainer{}\\n   539\u2192\\n   540\u2192\\tif cm.SystemCgroupsName != \\\"\\\" {\\n   541\u2192\\t\\tif cm.SystemCgroupsName == \\\"/\\\" {\\n   542\u2192\\t\\t\\treturn fmt.Errorf(\\\"system container cannot be root (\\\\\\\"/\\\\\\\")\\\")\\n   543\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   544\u2192\\t\\tcont, err := newSystemCgroups(cm.SystemCgroupsName)\\n   545\u2192\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n   546\u2192\\t\\t\\treturn err\\n   547\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   548\u2192\\t\\tcont.ensureStateFunc = func(manager cgroups.Manager) error {\\n   549\u2192\\t\\t\\treturn ensureSystemCgroups(logger, \\\"/\\\", manager)\\n   550\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   551\u2192\\t\\tsystemContainers = append(systemContainers, cont)\\n   552\u2192\\t}\\n   553\u2192\\n   554\u2192\\tif cm.KubeletCgroupsName != \\\"\\\" {\\n   555\u2192\\t\\tcont, err := newSystemCgroups(cm.KubeletCgroupsName)\\n   556\u2192\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n   557\u2192\\t\\t\\treturn err\\n   558\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   559\u2192\\n   560\u2192\\t\\tcont.ensureStateFunc = func(_ cgroups.Manager) error {\\n   561\u2192\\t\\t\\treturn ensureProcessInContainerWithOOMScore(logger, os.Getpid(), int(cm.KubeletOOMScoreAdj), cont.manager)\\n   562\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   563\u2192\\t\\tsystemContainers = append(systemContainers, cont)\\n   564\u2192\\t} else {\\n   565\u2192\\t\\tcm.periodicTasks = append(cm.periodicTasks, func() {\\n   566\u2192\\t\\t\\tif err := ensureProcessInContainerWithOOMScore(logger, os.Getpid(), int(cm.KubeletOOMScoreAdj), nil); err != nil {\\n   567\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\tlogger.Error(err, \\\"Failed to ensure process in container with oom score\\\")\\n   568\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\treturn\\n   569\u2192\\t\\t\\t}\\n   570\u2192\\t\\t\\tcont, err := getContainer(logger, os.Getpid())\\n   571\u2192\\t\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n   572\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\tlogger.Error(err, \\\"Failed to find cgroups of kubelet\\\")\\n   573\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\treturn\\n   574\u2192\\t\\t\\t}\\n   575\u2192\\t\\t\\tcm.Lock()\\n   576\u2192\\t\\t\\tdefer cm.Unlock()\\n   577\u2192\\n   578\u2192\\t\\t\\tcm.KubeletCgroupsName = cont\\n   579\u2192\\t\\t})\\n   580\u2192\\t}\\n   581\u2192\\n   582\u2192\\tcm.systemContainers = systemContainers\\n   583\u2192\\treturn nil\\n   584\u2192}\\n   585\u2192\\n   586\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) GetNodeConfig() NodeConfig {\\n   587\u2192\\tcm.RLock()\\n   588\u2192\\tdefer cm.RUnlock()\\n   589\u2192\\treturn cm.NodeConfig\\n   590\u2192}\\n   591\u2192\\n   592\u2192// GetPodCgroupRoot returns the literal cgroupfs value for the cgroup containing all pods.\\n   593\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) GetPodCgroupRoot() string {\\n   594\u2192\\treturn cm.cgroupManager.Name(cm.cgroupRoot)\\n   595\u2192}\\n   596\u2192\\n   597\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) GetMountedSubsystems() *CgroupSubsystems {\\n   598\u2192\\treturn cm.subsystems\\n   599\u2192}\\n   600\u2192\\n   601\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) GetQOSContainersInfo() QOSContainersInfo {\\n   602\u2192\\treturn cm.qosContainerManager.GetQOSContainersInfo()\\n   603\u2192}\\n   604\u2192\\n   605\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) UpdateQOSCgroups(logger klog.Logger) error {\\n   606\u2192\\treturn cm.qosContainerManager.UpdateCgroups(logger)\\n   607\u2192}\\n   608\u2192\\n   609\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) Status() Status {\\n   610\u2192\\tcm.RLock()\\n   611\u2192\\tdefer cm.RUnlock()\\n   612\u2192\\treturn cm.status\\n   613\u2192}\\n   614\u2192\\n   615\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) Start(ctx context.Context, node *v1.Node,\\n   616\u2192\\tactivePods ActivePodsFunc,\\n   617\u2192\\tgetNode GetNodeFunc,\\n   618\u2192\\tsourcesReady config.SourcesReady,\\n   619\u2192\\tpodStatusProvider status.PodStatusProvider,\\n   620\u2192\\truntimeService internalapi.RuntimeService,\\n   621\u2192\\tlocalStorageCapacityIsolation bool) error {\\n   622\u2192\\tlogger := klog.FromContext(ctx)\\n   623\u2192\\n   624\u2192\\tcontainerMap, containerRunningSet := buildContainerMapAndRunningSetFromRuntime(ctx, runtimeService)\\n   625\u2192\\n   626\u2192\\t// Initialize DRA manager\\n   627\u2192\\tif utilfeature.DefaultFeatureGate.Enabled(kubefeatures.DynamicResourceAllocation) {\\n   628\u2192\\t\\terr := cm.draManager.Start(ctx, dra.ActivePodsFunc(activePods), dra.GetNodeFunc(getNode), sourcesReady)\\n   629\u2192\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n   630\u2192\\t\\t\\treturn fmt.Errorf(\\\"start dra manager error: %w\\\", err)\\n   631\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   632\u2192\\t}\\n   633\u2192\\n   634\u2192\\t// Initialize CPU manager\\n   635\u2192\\terr := cm.cpuManager.Start(ctx, cpumanager.ActivePodsFunc(activePods), sourcesReady, podStatusProvider, runtimeService, containerMap.Clone())\\n   636\u2192\\tif err != nil {\\n   637\u2192\\t\\treturn fmt.Errorf(\\\"start cpu manager error: %w\\\", err)\\n   638\u2192\\t}\\n   639\u2192\\n   640\u2192\\t// Initialize memory manager\\n   641\u2192\\terr = cm.memoryManager.Start(ctx, memorymanager.ActivePodsFunc(activePods), sourcesReady, podStatusProvider, runtimeService, containerMap.Clone())\\n   642\u2192\\tif err != nil {\\n   643\u2192\\t\\treturn fmt.Errorf(\\\"start memory manager error: %w\\\", err)\\n   644\u2192\\t}\\n   645\u2192\\n   646\u2192\\t// cache the node Info including resource capacity and\\n   647\u2192\\t// allocatable of the node\\n   648\u2192\\tcm.nodeInfo = node\\n   649\u2192\\n   650\u2192\\tif localStorageCapacityIsolation {\\n   651\u2192\\t\\trootfs, err := cm.cadvisorInterface.RootFsInfo()\\n   652\u2192\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n   653\u2192\\t\\t\\treturn fmt.Errorf(\\\"failed to get rootfs info: %v\\\", err)\\n   654\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   655\u2192\\t\\tcm.Lock()\\n   656\u2192\\t\\tfor rName, rCap := range cadvisor.EphemeralStorageCapacityFromFsInfo(rootfs) {\\n   657\u2192\\t\\t\\tcm.capacity[rName] = rCap\\n   658\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   659\u2192\\t\\tcm.Unlock()\\n   660\u2192\\t}\\n   661\u2192\\n   662\u2192\\t// Ensure that node allocatable configuration is valid.\\n   663\u2192\\tif err := cm.validateNodeAllocatable(); err != nil {\\n   664\u2192\\t\\treturn err\\n   665\u2192\\t}\\n   666\u2192\\n   667\u2192\\t// Setup the node\\n   668\u2192\\tif err := cm.setupNode(ctx, activePods); err != nil {\\n   669\u2192\\t\\treturn err\\n   670\u2192\\t}\\n   671\u2192\\n   672\u2192\\t// Don't run a background thread if there are no ensureStateFuncs.\\n   673\u2192\\thasEnsureStateFuncs := false\\n   674\u2192\\tfor _, cont := range cm.systemContainers {\\n   675\u2192\\t\\tif cont.ensureStateFunc != nil {\\n   676\u2192\\t\\t\\thasEnsureStateFuncs = true\\n   677\u2192\\t\\t\\tbreak\\n   678\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   679\u2192\\t}\\n   680\u2192\\tif hasEnsureStateFuncs {\\n   681\u2192\\t\\t// Run ensure state functions every minute.\\n   682\u2192\\t\\tgo wait.Until(func() {\\n   683\u2192\\t\\t\\tfor _, cont := range cm.systemContainers {\\n   684\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\tif cont.ensureStateFunc != nil {\\n   685\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif err := cont.ensureStateFunc(cont.manager); err != nil {\\n   686\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tlogger.Info(\\\"Failed to ensure state\\\", \\\"containerName\\\", cont.name, \\\"err\\\", err)\\n   687\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n   688\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n   689\u2192\\t\\t\\t}\\n   690\u2192\\t\\t}, time.Minute, wait.NeverStop)\\n   691\u2192\\n   692\u2192\\t}\\n   693\u2192\\n   694\u2192\\tif len(cm.periodicTasks) > 0 {\\n   695\u2192\\t\\tgo wait.Until(func() {\\n   696\u2192\\t\\t\\tfor _, task := range cm.periodicTasks {\\n   697\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\tif task != nil {\\n   698\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t\\ttask()\\n   699\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n   700\u2192\\t\\t\\t}\\n   701\u2192\\t\\t}, 5*time.Minute, wait.NeverStop)\\n   702\u2192\\t}\\n   703\u2192\\n   704\u2192\\t// Starts device manager.\\n   705\u2192\\tif err := cm.deviceManager.Start(klog.FromContext(ctx), devicemanager.ActivePodsFunc(activePods), sourcesReady, containerMap.Clone(), containerRunningSet); err != nil {\\n   706\u2192\\t\\treturn err\\n   707\u2192\\t}\\n   708\u2192\\n   709\u2192\\treturn nil\\n   710\u2192}\\n   711\u2192\\n   712\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) GetPluginRegistrationHandlers() map[string]cache.PluginHandler {\\n   713\u2192\\tres := map[string]cache.PluginHandler{\\n   714\u2192\\t\\tpluginwatcherapi.DevicePlugin: cm.deviceManager.GetWatcherHandler(),\\n   715\u2192\\t}\\n   716\u2192\\n   717\u2192\\tif utilfeature.DefaultFeatureGate.Enabled(kubefeatures.DynamicResourceAllocation) {\\n   718\u2192\\t\\tres[pluginwatcherapi.DRAPlugin] = cm.draManager.GetWatcherHandler()\\n   719\u2192\\t}\\n   720\u2192\\n   721\u2192\\treturn res\\n   722\u2192}\\n   723\u2192\\n   724\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) GetHealthCheckers() []healthz.HealthChecker {\\n   725\u2192\\treturn []healthz.HealthChecker{cm.deviceManager.GetHealthChecker()}\\n   726\u2192}\\n   727\u2192\\n   728\u2192// TODO: move the GetResources logic to PodContainerManager.\\n   729\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) GetResources(ctx context.Context, pod *v1.Pod, container *v1.Container) (*kubecontainer.RunContainerOptions, error) {\\n   730\u2192\\tlogger := klog.FromContext(ctx)\\n   731\u2192\\topts := &kubecontainer.RunContainerOptions{}\\n   732\u2192\\tif utilfeature.DefaultFeatureGate.Enabled(kubefeatures.DynamicResourceAllocation) {\\n   733\u2192\\t\\tresOpts, err := cm.draManager.GetResources(pod, container)\\n   734\u2192\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n   735\u2192\\t\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n   736\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   737\u2192\\t\\tlogger.V(5).Info(\\\"Determined CDI devices for pod\\\", \\\"pod\\\", klog.KObj(pod), \\\"cdiDevices\\\", resOpts.CDIDevices)\\n   738\u2192\\t\\topts.CDIDevices = append(opts.CDIDevices, resOpts.CDIDevices...)\\n   739\u2192\\t}\\n   740\u2192\\t// Allocate should already be called during predicateAdmitHandler.Admit(),\\n   741\u2192\\t// just try to fetch device runtime information from cached state here\\n   742\u2192\\tdevOpts, err := cm.deviceManager.GetDeviceRunContainerOptions(ctx, pod, container)\\n   743\u2192\\tif err != nil {\\n   744\u2192\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n   745\u2192\\t} else if devOpts == nil {\\n   746\u2192\\t\\treturn opts, nil\\n   747\u2192\\t}\\n   748\u2192\\topts.Devices = append(opts.Devices, devOpts.Devices...)\\n   749\u2192\\topts.Mounts = append(opts.Mounts, devOpts.Mounts...)\\n   750\u2192\\topts.Envs = append(opts.Envs, devOpts.Envs...)\\n   751\u2192\\topts.Annotations = append(opts.Annotations, devOpts.Annotations...)\\n   752\u2192\\topts.CDIDevices = append(opts.CDIDevices, devOpts.CDIDevices...)\\n   753\u2192\\treturn opts, nil\\n   754\u2192}\\n   755\u2192\\n   756\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) UpdatePluginResources(node *schedulerframework.NodeInfo, attrs *lifecycle.PodAdmitAttributes) error {\\n   757\u2192\\treturn cm.deviceManager.UpdatePluginResources(node, attrs)\\n   758\u2192}\\n   759\u2192\\n   760\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) GetAllocateResourcesPodAdmitHandler() lifecycle.PodAdmitHandler {\\n   761\u2192\\treturn cm.topologyManager\\n   762\u2192}\\n   763\u2192\\n   764\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) SystemCgroupsLimit() v1.ResourceList {\\n   765\u2192\\tcpuLimit := int64(0)\\n   766\u2192\\n   767\u2192\\t// Sum up resources of all external containers.\\n   768\u2192\\tfor _, cont := range cm.systemContainers {\\n   769\u2192\\t\\tcpuLimit += cont.cpuMillicores\\n   770\u2192\\t}\\n   771\u2192\\n   772\u2192\\treturn v1.ResourceList{\\n   773\u2192\\t\\tv1.ResourceCPU: *resource.NewMilliQuantity(\\n   774\u2192\\t\\t\\tcpuLimit,\\n   775\u2192\\t\\t\\tresource.DecimalSI),\\n   776\u2192\\t}\\n   777\u2192}\\n   778\u2192\\n   779\u2192func isProcessRunningInHost(logger klog.Logger, pid int) (bool, error) {\\n   780\u2192\\t// Get init pid namespace.\\n   781\u2192\\tinitPidNs, err := os.Readlink(\\\"/proc/1/ns/pid\\\")\\n   782\u2192\\tif err != nil {\\n   783\u2192\\t\\treturn false, fmt.Errorf(\\\"failed to find pid namespace of init process\\\")\\n   784\u2192\\t}\\n   785\u2192\\tlogger.V(10).Info(\\\"Found init PID namespace\\\", \\\"namespace\\\", initPidNs)\\n   786\u2192\\tprocessPidNs, err := os.Readlink(fmt.Sprintf(\\\"/proc/%d/ns/pid\\\", pid))\\n   787\u2192\\tif err != nil {\\n   788\u2192\\t\\treturn false, fmt.Errorf(\\\"failed to find pid namespace of process %q\\\", pid)\\n   789\u2192\\t}\\n   790\u2192\\tlogger.V(10).Info(\\\"Process info\\\", \\\"pid\\\", pid, \\\"namespace\\\", processPidNs)\\n   791\u2192\\treturn initPidNs == processPidNs, nil\\n   792\u2192}\\n   793\u2192\\n   794\u2192func ensureProcessInContainerWithOOMScore(logger klog.Logger, pid int, oomScoreAdj int, manager cgroups.Manager) error {\\n   795\u2192\\tif runningInHost, err := isProcessRunningInHost(logger, pid); err != nil {\\n   796\u2192\\t\\t// Err on the side of caution. Avoid moving the docker daemon unless we are able to identify its context.\\n   797\u2192\\t\\treturn err\\n   798\u2192\\t} else if !runningInHost {\\n   799\u2192\\t\\t// Process is running inside a container. Don't touch that.\\n   800\u2192\\t\\tlogger.V(2).Info(\\\"PID is not running in the host namespace\\\", \\\"pid\\\", pid)\\n   801\u2192\\t\\treturn nil\\n   802\u2192\\t}\\n   803\u2192\\n   804\u2192\\tvar errs []error\\n   805\u2192\\tif manager != nil {\\n   806\u2192\\t\\tcont, err := getContainer(logger, pid)\\n   807\u2192\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n   808\u2192\\t\\t\\terrs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf(\\\"failed to find container of PID %d: %v\\\", pid, err))\\n   809\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   810\u2192\\n   811\u2192\\t\\tname := \\\"\\\"\\n   812\u2192\\t\\tcgroups, err := manager.GetCgroups()\\n   813\u2192\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n   814\u2192\\t\\t\\terrs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf(\\\"failed to get cgroups for %d: %v\\\", pid, err))\\n   815\u2192\\t\\t} else {\\n   816\u2192\\t\\t\\tname = cgroups.Name\\n   817\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   818\u2192\\n   819\u2192\\t\\tif cont != name {\\n   820\u2192\\t\\t\\terr = manager.Apply(pid)\\n   821\u2192\\t\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n   822\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\terrs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf(\\\"failed to move PID %d (in %q) to %q: %v\\\", pid, cont, name, err))\\n   823\u2192\\t\\t\\t}\\n   824\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   825\u2192\\t}\\n   826\u2192\\n   827\u2192\\t// Also apply oom-score-adj to processes\\n   828\u2192\\toomAdjuster := oom.NewOOMAdjuster()\\n   829\u2192\\tlogger.V(5).Info(\\\"Attempting to apply oom_score_adj to process\\\", \\\"oomScoreAdj\\\", oomScoreAdj, \\\"pid\\\", pid)\\n   830\u2192\\tif err := oomAdjuster.ApplyOOMScoreAdj(pid, oomScoreAdj); err != nil {\\n   831\u2192\\t\\tlogger.V(3).Info(\\\"Failed to apply oom_score_adj to process\\\", \\\"oomScoreAdj\\\", oomScoreAdj, \\\"pid\\\", pid, \\\"err\\\", err)\\n   832\u2192\\t\\terrs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf(\\\"failed to apply oom score %d to PID %d: %v\\\", oomScoreAdj, pid, err))\\n   833\u2192\\t}\\n   834\u2192\\treturn utilerrors.NewAggregate(errs)\\n   835\u2192}\\n   836\u2192\\n   837\u2192// getContainer returns the cgroup associated with the specified pid.\\n   838\u2192// It enforces a unified hierarchy for memory and cpu cgroups.\\n   839\u2192// On systemd environments, it uses the name=systemd cgroup for the specified pid.\\n   840\u2192func getContainer(logger klog.Logger, pid int) (string, error) {\\n   841\u2192\\tcgs, err := cgroups.ParseCgroupFile(fmt.Sprintf(\\\"/proc/%d/cgroup\\\", pid))\\n   842\u2192\\tif err != nil {\\n   843\u2192\\t\\treturn \\\"\\\", err\\n   844\u2192\\t}\\n   845\u2192\\n   846\u2192\\tif cgroups.IsCgroup2UnifiedMode() {\\n   847\u2192\\t\\tc, found := cgs[\\\"\\\"]\\n   848\u2192\\t\\tif !found {\\n   849\u2192\\t\\t\\treturn \\\"\\\", cgroups.NewNotFoundError(\\\"unified\\\")\\n   850\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   851\u2192\\t\\treturn c, nil\\n   852\u2192\\t}\\n   853\u2192\\n   854\u2192\\tcpu, found := cgs[\\\"cpu\\\"]\\n   855\u2192\\tif !found {\\n   856\u2192\\t\\treturn \\\"\\\", cgroups.NewNotFoundError(\\\"cpu\\\")\\n   857\u2192\\t}\\n   858\u2192\\tmemory, found := cgs[\\\"memory\\\"]\\n   859\u2192\\tif !found {\\n   860\u2192\\t\\treturn \\\"\\\", cgroups.NewNotFoundError(\\\"memory\\\")\\n   861\u2192\\t}\\n   862\u2192\\n   863\u2192\\t// since we use this container for accounting, we need to ensure its a unified hierarchy.\\n   864\u2192\\tif cpu != memory {\\n   865\u2192\\t\\treturn \\\"\\\", fmt.Errorf(\\\"cpu and memory cgroup hierarchy not unified.  cpu: %s, memory: %s\\\", cpu, memory)\\n   866\u2192\\t}\\n   867\u2192\\n   868\u2192\\t// on systemd, every pid is in a unified cgroup hierarchy (name=systemd as seen in systemd-cgls)\\n   869\u2192\\t// cpu and memory accounting is off by default, users may choose to enable it per unit or globally.\\n   870\u2192\\t// users could enable CPU and memory accounting globally via /etc/systemd/system.conf (DefaultCPUAccounting=true DefaultMemoryAccounting=true).\\n   871\u2192\\t// users could also enable CPU and memory accounting per unit via CPUAccounting=true and MemoryAccounting=true\\n   872\u2192\\t// we only warn if accounting is not enabled for CPU or memory so as to not break local development flows where kubelet is launched in a terminal.\\n   873\u2192\\t// for example, the cgroup for the user session will be something like /user.slice/user-X.slice/session-X.scope, but the cpu and memory\\n   874\u2192\\t// cgroup will be the closest ancestor where accounting is performed (most likely /) on systems that launch docker containers.\\n   875\u2192\\t// as a result, on those systems, you will not get cpu or memory accounting statistics for kubelet.\\n   876\u2192\\t// in addition, you would not get memory or cpu accounting for the runtime unless accounting was enabled on its unit (or globally).\\n   877\u2192\\tif systemd, found := cgs[\\\"name=systemd\\\"]; found {\\n   878\u2192\\t\\tif systemd != cpu {\\n   879\u2192\\t\\t\\tlogger.Info(\\\"CPUAccounting not enabled for process\\\", \\\"pid\\\", pid)\\n   880\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   881\u2192\\t\\tif systemd != memory {\\n   882\u2192\\t\\t\\tlogger.Info(\\\"MemoryAccounting not enabled for process\\\", \\\"pid\\\", pid)\\n   883\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   884\u2192\\t\\treturn systemd, nil\\n   885\u2192\\t}\\n   886\u2192\\n   887\u2192\\treturn cpu, nil\\n   888\u2192}\\n   889\u2192\\n   890\u2192// Ensures the system container is created and all non-kernel threads and process 1\\n   891\u2192// without a container are moved to it.\\n   892\u2192//\\n   893\u2192// The reason of leaving kernel threads at root cgroup is that we don't want to tie the\\n   894\u2192// execution of these threads with to-be defined /system quota and create priority inversions.\\n   895\u2192func ensureSystemCgroups(logger klog.Logger, rootCgroupPath string, manager cgroups.Manager) error {\\n   896\u2192\\t// Move non-kernel PIDs to the system container.\\n   897\u2192\\t// Only keep errors on latest attempt.\\n   898\u2192\\tvar finalErr error\\n   899\u2192\\tfor i := 0; i <= 10; i++ {\\n   900\u2192\\t\\tallPids, err := cmutil.GetPids(rootCgroupPath)\\n   901\u2192\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n   902\u2192\\t\\t\\tfinalErr = fmt.Errorf(\\\"failed to list PIDs for root: %v\\\", err)\\n   903\u2192\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n   904\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   905\u2192\\n   906\u2192\\t\\t// Remove kernel pids and other protected PIDs (pid 1, PIDs already in system & kubelet containers)\\n   907\u2192\\t\\tpids := make([]int, 0, len(allPids))\\n   908\u2192\\t\\tfor _, pid := range allPids {\\n   909\u2192\\t\\t\\tif pid == 1 || isKernelPid(pid) {\\n   910\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n   911\u2192\\t\\t\\t}\\n   912\u2192\\n   913\u2192\\t\\t\\tpids = append(pids, pid)\\n   914\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   915\u2192\\n   916\u2192\\t\\t// Check if we have moved all the non-kernel PIDs.\\n   917\u2192\\t\\tif len(pids) == 0 {\\n   918\u2192\\t\\t\\treturn nil\\n   919\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   920\u2192\\n   921\u2192\\t\\tlogger.V(3).Info(\\\"Moving non-kernel processes\\\", \\\"pids\\\", pids)\\n   922\u2192\\t\\tfor _, pid := range pids {\\n   923\u2192\\t\\t\\terr := manager.Apply(pid)\\n   924\u2192\\t\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n   925\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\tname := \\\"\\\"\\n   926\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\tcgroups, err := manager.GetCgroups()\\n   927\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\tif err == nil {\\n   928\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tname = cgroups.Name\\n   929\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n   930\u2192\\n   931\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\tfinalErr = fmt.Errorf(\\\"failed to move PID %d into the system container %q: %v\\\", pid, name, err)\\n   932\u2192\\t\\t\\t}\\n   933\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   934\u2192\\n   935\u2192\\t}\\n   936\u2192\\n   937\u2192\\treturn finalErr\\n   938\u2192}\\n   939\u2192\\n   940\u2192// Determines whether the specified PID is a kernel PID.\\n   941\u2192func isKernelPid(pid int) bool {\\n   942\u2192\\t// Kernel threads have no associated executable.\\n   943\u2192\\t_, err := os.Readlink(fmt.Sprintf(\\\"/proc/%d/exe\\\", pid))\\n   944\u2192\\treturn err != nil && os.IsNotExist(err)\\n   945\u2192}\\n   946\u2192\\n   947\u2192// GetCapacity returns node capacity data for \\\"cpu\\\", \\\"memory\\\", \\\"ephemeral-storage\\\", and \\\"huge-pages*\\\"\\n   948\u2192// At present this method is only invoked when introspecting ephemeral storage\\n   949\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) GetCapacity(localStorageCapacityIsolation bool) v1.ResourceList {\\n   950\u2192\\tcm.RLock()\\n   951\u2192\\tdefer cm.RUnlock()\\n   952\u2192\\t// Use klog.TODO() because we currently do not have a proper logger to pass in.\\n   953\u2192\\t// Replace this with an appropriate logger when refactoring this function to accept a logger parameter.\\n   954\u2192\\tlogger := klog.TODO()\\n   955\u2192\\tif localStorageCapacityIsolation {\\n   956\u2192\\t\\t// We store allocatable ephemeral-storage in the capacity property once we Start() the container manager\\n   957\u2192\\t\\tif _, ok := cm.capacity[v1.ResourceEphemeralStorage]; !ok {\\n   958\u2192\\t\\t\\t// If we haven't yet stored the capacity for ephemeral-storage, we can try to fetch it directly from cAdvisor,\\n   959\u2192\\t\\t\\tif cm.cadvisorInterface != nil {\\n   960\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\trootfs, err := cm.cadvisorInterface.RootFsInfo()\\n   961\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n   962\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tlogger.Error(err, \\\"Unable to get rootfs data from cAdvisor interface\\\")\\n   963\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t// If the rootfsinfo retrieval from cAdvisor fails for any reason, fallback to returning the capacity property with no ephemeral storage data\\n   964\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t\\treturn cm.capacity\\n   965\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n   966\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t// We don't want to mutate cm.capacity here so we'll manually construct a v1.ResourceList from it,\\n   967\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t// and add ephemeral-storage\\n   968\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\tcapacityWithEphemeralStorage := v1.ResourceList{}\\n   969\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\tfor rName, rQuant := range cm.capacity {\\n   970\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tcapacityWithEphemeralStorage[rName] = rQuant\\n   971\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n   972\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\tcapacityWithEphemeralStorage[v1.ResourceEphemeralStorage] = cadvisor.EphemeralStorageCapacityFromFsInfo(rootfs)[v1.ResourceEphemeralStorage]\\n   973\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\treturn capacityWithEphemeralStorage\\n   974\u2192\\t\\t\\t}\\n   975\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   976\u2192\\t}\\n   977\u2192\\treturn cm.capacity\\n   978\u2192}\\n   979\u2192\\n   980\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) GetDevicePluginResourceCapacity() (v1.ResourceList, v1.ResourceList, []string) {\\n   981\u2192\\treturn cm.deviceManager.GetCapacity()\\n   982\u2192}\\n   983\u2192\\n   984\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) GetDevices(podUID, containerName string) []*podresourcesapi.ContainerDevices {\\n   985\u2192\\treturn containerDevicesFromResourceDeviceInstances(cm.deviceManager.GetDevices(podUID, containerName))\\n   986\u2192}\\n   987\u2192\\n   988\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) GetAllocatableDevices() []*podresourcesapi.ContainerDevices {\\n   989\u2192\\treturn containerDevicesFromResourceDeviceInstances(cm.deviceManager.GetAllocatableDevices())\\n   990\u2192}\\n   991\u2192\\n   992\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) GetCPUs(podUID, containerName string) []int64 {\\n   993\u2192\\tif cm.cpuManager != nil {\\n   994\u2192\\t\\treturn int64Slice(cm.cpuManager.GetExclusiveCPUs(podUID, containerName).UnsortedList())\\n   995\u2192\\t}\\n   996\u2192\\treturn []int64{}\\n   997\u2192}\\n   998\u2192\\n   999\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) GetAllocatableCPUs() []int64 {\\n  1000\u2192\\tif cm.cpuManager != nil {\\n  1001\u2192\\t\\treturn int64Slice(cm.cpuManager.GetAllocatableCPUs().UnsortedList())\\n  1002\u2192\\t}\\n  1003\u2192\\treturn []int64{}\\n  1004\u2192}\\n  1005\u2192\\n  1006\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) GetMemory(podUID, containerName string) []*podresourcesapi.ContainerMemory {\\n  1007\u2192\\tif cm.memoryManager == nil {\\n  1008\u2192\\t\\treturn []*podresourcesapi.ContainerMemory{}\\n  1009\u2192\\t}\\n  1010\u2192\\n  1011\u2192\\t// This is tempporary as part of migration of memory manager to Contextual logging.\\n  1012\u2192\\t// Direct context to be passed when container manager is migrated.\\n  1013\u2192\\treturn containerMemoryFromBlock(cm.memoryManager.GetMemory(podUID, containerName))\\n  1014\u2192}\\n  1015\u2192\\n  1016\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) GetAllocatableMemory() []*podresourcesapi.ContainerMemory {\\n  1017\u2192\\tif cm.memoryManager == nil {\\n  1018\u2192\\t\\treturn []*podresourcesapi.ContainerMemory{}\\n  1019\u2192\\t}\\n  1020\u2192\\n  1021\u2192\\t// This is tempporary as part of migration of memory manager to Contextual logging.\\n  1022\u2192\\t// Direct context to be passed when container manager is migrated.\\n  1023\u2192\\treturn containerMemoryFromBlock(cm.memoryManager.GetAllocatableMemory())\\n  1024\u2192}\\n  1025\u2192\\n  1026\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) GetDynamicResources(pod *v1.Pod, container *v1.Container) []*podresourcesapi.DynamicResource {\\n  1027\u2192\\t// Use klog.TODO() because we currently do not have a proper logger to pass in.\\n  1028\u2192\\t// Replace this with an appropriate logger when refactoring this function to accept a logger parameter.\\n  1029\u2192\\tlogger := klog.TODO()\\n  1030\u2192\\tif !utilfeature.DefaultFeatureGate.Enabled(kubefeatures.DynamicResourceAllocation) {\\n  1031\u2192\\t\\treturn []*podresourcesapi.DynamicResource{}\\n  1032\u2192\\t}\\n  1033\u2192\\n  1034\u2192\\tvar containerDynamicResources []*podresourcesapi.DynamicResource\\n  1035\u2192\\tcontainerClaimInfos, err := cm.draManager.GetContainerClaimInfos(pod, container)\\n  1036\u2192\\tif err != nil {\\n  1037\u2192\\t\\tlogger.Error(err, \\\"Unable to get container claim info state\\\")\\n  1038\u2192\\t\\treturn []*podresourcesapi.DynamicResource{}\\n  1039\u2192\\t}\\n  1040\u2192\\tfor _, containerClaimInfo := range containerClaimInfos {\\n  1041\u2192\\t\\tvar claimResources []*podresourcesapi.ClaimResource\\n  1042\u2192\\t\\tfor driverName, driverState := range containerClaimInfo.DriverState {\\n  1043\u2192\\t\\t\\tvar cdiDevices []*podresourcesapi.CDIDevice\\n  1044\u2192\\t\\t\\tfor _, device := range driverState.Devices {\\n  1045\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\tfor _, cdiDeviceID := range device.CDIDeviceIDs {\\n  1046\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tcdiDevices = append(cdiDevices, &podresourcesapi.CDIDevice{Name: cdiDeviceID})\\n  1047\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n  1048\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\tresources := &podresourcesapi.ClaimResource{\\n  1049\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tCdiDevices: cdiDevices,\\n  1050\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tDriverName: driverName,\\n  1051\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tPoolName:   device.PoolName,\\n  1052\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tDeviceName: device.DeviceName,\\n  1053\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tShareId:    (*string)(device.ShareID),\\n  1054\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n  1055\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\tclaimResources = append(claimResources, resources)\\n  1056\u2192\\t\\t\\t}\\n  1057\u2192\\t\\t}\\n  1058\u2192\\t\\tcontainerDynamicResource := podresourcesapi.DynamicResource{\\n  1059\u2192\\t\\t\\tClaimName:      containerClaimInfo.ClaimName,\\n  1060\u2192\\t\\t\\tClaimNamespace: containerClaimInfo.Namespace,\\n  1061\u2192\\t\\t\\tClaimResources: claimResources,\\n  1062\u2192\\t\\t}\\n  1063\u2192\\t\\tcontainerDynamicResources = append(containerDynamicResources, &containerDynamicResource)\\n  1064\u2192\\t}\\n  1065\u2192\\treturn containerDynamicResources\\n  1066\u2192}\\n  1067\u2192\\n  1068\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) ShouldResetExtendedResourceCapacity() bool {\\n  1069\u2192\\treturn cm.deviceManager.ShouldResetExtendedResourceCapacity()\\n  1070\u2192}\\n  1071\u2192\\n  1072\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) UpdateAllocatedDevices() {\\n  1073\u2192\\tcm.deviceManager.UpdateAllocatedDevices()\\n  1074\u2192}\\n  1075\u2192\\n  1076\u2192func containerMemoryFromBlock(blocks []memorymanagerstate.Block) []*podresourcesapi.ContainerMemory {\\n  1077\u2192\\tvar containerMemories []*podresourcesapi.ContainerMemory\\n  1078\u2192\\n  1079\u2192\\tfor _, b := range blocks {\\n  1080\u2192\\t\\tcontainerMemory := podresourcesapi.ContainerMemory{\\n  1081\u2192\\t\\t\\tMemoryType: string(b.Type),\\n  1082\u2192\\t\\t\\tSize:       b.Size,\\n  1083\u2192\\t\\t\\tTopology: &podresourcesapi.TopologyInfo{\\n  1084\u2192\\t\\t\\t\\tNodes: []*podresourcesapi.NUMANode{},\\n  1085\u2192\\t\\t\\t},\\n  1086\u2192\\t\\t}\\n  1087\u2192\\n  1088\u2192\\t\\tfor _, numaNodeID := range b.NUMAAffinity {\\n  1089\u2192\\t\\t\\tcontainerMemory.Topology.Nodes = append(containerMemory.Topology.Nodes, &podresourcesapi.NUMANode{ID: int64(numaNodeID)})\\n  1090\u2192\\t\\t}\\n  1091\u2192\\n  1092\u2192\\t\\tcontainerMemories = append(containerMemories, &containerMemory)\\n  1093\u2192\\t}\\n  1094\u2192\\n  1095\u2192\\treturn containerMemories\\n  1096\u2192}\\n  1097\u2192\\n  1098\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) PrepareDynamicResources(ctx context.Context, pod *v1.Pod) error {\\n  1099\u2192\\treturn cm.draManager.PrepareResources(ctx, pod)\\n  1100\u2192}\\n  1101\u2192\\n  1102\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) UnprepareDynamicResources(ctx context.Context, pod *v1.Pod) error {\\n  1103\u2192\\treturn cm.draManager.UnprepareResources(ctx, pod)\\n  1104\u2192}\\n  1105\u2192\\n  1106\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) PodMightNeedToUnprepareResources(UID types.UID) bool {\\n  1107\u2192\\treturn cm.draManager.PodMightNeedToUnprepareResources(UID)\\n  1108\u2192}\\n  1109\u2192\\n  1110\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) UpdateAllocatedResourcesStatus(pod *v1.Pod, status *v1.PodStatus) {\\n  1111\u2192\\n  1112\u2192\\t// For now we only support Device Plugin\\n  1113\u2192\\tcm.deviceManager.UpdateAllocatedResourcesStatus(pod, status)\\n  1114\u2192\\n  1115\u2192\\t// Update DRA resources if the feature is enabled and the manager exists\\n  1116\u2192\\tif utilfeature.DefaultFeatureGate.Enabled(kubefeatures.DynamicResourceAllocation) && cm.draManager != nil {\\n  1117\u2192\\t\\tif utilfeature.DefaultFeatureGate.Enabled(kubefeatures.ResourceHealthStatus) {\\n  1118\u2192\\t\\t\\tcm.draManager.UpdateAllocatedResourcesStatus(pod, status)\\n  1119\u2192\\t\\t}\\n  1120\u2192\\t}\\n  1121\u2192}\\n  1122\u2192\\n  1123\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) Updates() <-chan resourceupdates.Update {\\n  1124\u2192\\treturn cm.resourceUpdates\\n  1125\u2192}\\n  1126\u2192\\n\\n<system-reminder>\\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware.  16\u2192limitations under the License.\\n    17\u2192*/\\n    18\u2192\\n    19\u2192// containerManagerImpl implements container manager on Windows.\\n    20\u2192// Only GetNodeAllocatableReservation() and GetCapacity() are implemented now.\\n    21\u2192\\n    22\u2192package cm\\n    23\u2192\\n    24\u2192import (\\n    25\u2192\\t\\\"context\\\"\\n    26\u2192\\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n    27\u2192\\t\\\"sync\\\"\\n    28\u2192\\n    29\u2192\\tutilfeature \\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/util/feature\\\"\\n    30\u2192\\tkubefeatures \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/features\\\"\\n    31\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/cm/memorymanager\\\"\\n    32\u2192\\n    33\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/klog/v2\\\"\\n    34\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/mount-utils\\\"\\n    35\u2192\\n    36\u2192\\tv1 \\\"k8s.io/api/core/v1\\\"\\n    37\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/resource\\\"\\n    38\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/types\\\"\\n    39\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/healthz\\\"\\n    40\u2192\\tclientset \\\"k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes\\\"\\n    41\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/client-go/tools/record\\\"\\n    42\u2192\\tinternalapi \\\"k8s.io/cri-api/pkg/apis\\\"\\n    43\u2192\\tpluginwatcherapi \\\"k8s.io/kubelet/pkg/apis/pluginregistration/v1\\\"\\n    44\u2192\\tpodresourcesapi \\\"k8s.io/kubelet/pkg/apis/podresources/v1\\\"\\n    45\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/cadvisor\\\"\\n    46\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/cm/cpumanager\\\"\\n    47\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager\\\"\\n    48\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/cm/resourceupdates\\\"\\n    49\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/cm/topologymanager\\\"\\n    50\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/config\\\"\\n    51\u2192\\tkubecontainer \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/container\\\"\\n    52\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/lifecycle\\\"\\n    53\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/pluginmanager/cache\\\"\\n    54\u2192\\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/status\\\"\\n    55\u2192\\tschedulerframework \\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/framework\\\"\\n    56\u2192)\\n    57\u2192\\n    58\u2192type containerManagerImpl struct {\\n    59\u2192\\t// Capacity of this node.\\n    60\u2192\\tcapacity v1.ResourceList\\n    61\u2192\\t// Interface for cadvisor.\\n    62\u2192\\tcadvisorInterface cadvisor.Interface\\n    63\u2192\\t// Config of this node.\\n    64\u2192\\tnodeConfig NodeConfig\\n    65\u2192\\t// Interface for exporting and allocating devices reported by device plugins.\\n    66\u2192\\tdeviceManager devicemanager.Manager\\n    67\u2192\\t// Interface for Topology resource co-ordination\\n    68\u2192\\ttopologyManager topologymanager.Manager\\n    69\u2192\\tcpuManager      cpumanager.Manager\\n    70\u2192\\tmemoryManager   memorymanager.Manager\\n    71\u2192\\tnodeInfo        *v1.Node\\n    72\u2192\\tsync.RWMutex\\n    73\u2192}\\n    74\u2192\\n    75\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) Start(ctx context.Context, node *v1.Node,\\n    76\u2192\\tactivePods ActivePodsFunc,\\n    77\u2192\\tgetNode GetNodeFunc,\\n    78\u2192\\tsourcesReady config.SourcesReady,\\n    79\u2192\\tpodStatusProvider status.PodStatusProvider,\\n    80\u2192\\truntimeService internalapi.RuntimeService,\\n    81\u2192\\tlocalStorageCapacityIsolation bool) error {\\n    82\u2192\\tlogger := klog.FromContext(ctx)\\n    83\u2192\\tlogger.V(2).Info(\\\"Starting Windows container manager\\\")\\n    84\u2192\\n    85\u2192\\tcm.nodeInfo = node\\n    86\u2192\\n    87\u2192\\tif localStorageCapacityIsolation {\\n    88\u2192\\t\\trootfs, err := cm.cadvisorInterface.RootFsInfo()\\n    89\u2192\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n    90\u2192\\t\\t\\treturn fmt.Errorf(\\\"failed to get rootfs info: %v\\\", err)\\n    91\u2192\\t\\t}\\n    92\u2192\\t\\tfor rName, rCap := range cadvisor.EphemeralStorageCapacityFromFsInfo(rootfs) {\\n    93\u2192\\t\\t\\tcm.capacity[rName] = rCap\\n    94\u2192\\t\\t}\\n    95\u2192\\t}\\n    96\u2192\\n    97\u2192\\tcontainerMap, containerRunningSet := buildContainerMapAndRunningSetFromRuntime(ctx, runtimeService)\\n    98\u2192\\n    99\u2192\\tif utilfeature.DefaultFeatureGate.Enabled(kubefeatures.WindowsCPUAndMemoryAffinity) {\\n   100\u2192\\t\\terr := cm.cpuManager.Start(ctx, cpumanager.ActivePodsFunc(activePods), sourcesReady, podStatusProvider, runtimeService, containerMap.Clone())\\n   101\u2192\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n   102\u2192\\t\\t\\treturn fmt.Errorf(\\\"start cpu manager error: %v\\\", err)\\n   103\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   104\u2192\\n   105\u2192\\t\\t// Initialize memory manager\\n   106\u2192\\t\\terr = cm.memoryManager.Start(ctx, memorymanager.ActivePodsFunc(activePods), sourcesReady, podStatusProvider, runtimeService, containerMap.Clone())\\n   107\u2192\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n   108\u2192\\t\\t\\treturn fmt.Errorf(\\\"start memory manager error: %v\\\", err)\\n   109\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   110\u2192\\t}\\n   111\u2192\\n   112\u2192\\t// Starts device manager.\\n   113\u2192\\tif err := cm.deviceManager.Start(logger, devicemanager.ActivePodsFunc(activePods), sourcesReady, containerMap.Clone(), containerRunningSet); err != nil {\\n   114\u2192\\t\\treturn err\\n   115\u2192\\t}\\n   116\u2192\\n   117\u2192\\treturn nil\\n   118\u2192}\\n   119\u2192\\n   120\u2192// NewContainerManager creates windows container manager.\\n   121\u2192func NewContainerManager(ctx context.Context, mountUtil mount.Interface, cadvisorInterface cadvisor.Interface, nodeConfig NodeConfig, failSwapOn bool, recorder record.EventRecorder, kubeClient clientset.Interface) (ContainerManager, error) {\\n   122\u2192\\t// It is safe to invoke `MachineInfo` on cAdvisor before logically initializing cAdvisor here because\\n   123\u2192\\t// machine info is computed and cached once as part of cAdvisor object creation.\\n   124\u2192\\t// But `RootFsInfo` and `ImagesFsInfo` are not available at this moment so they will be called later during manager starts\\n   125\u2192\\tmachineInfo, err := cadvisorInterface.MachineInfo()\\n   126\u2192\\tif err != nil {\\n   127\u2192\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n   128\u2192\\t}\\n   129\u2192\\tcapacity := cadvisor.CapacityFromMachineInfo(machineInfo)\\n   130\u2192\\n   131\u2192\\tcm := &containerManagerImpl{\\n   132\u2192\\t\\tcapacity:          capacity,\\n   133\u2192\\t\\tnodeConfig:        nodeConfig,\\n   134\u2192\\t\\tcadvisorInterface: cadvisorInterface,\\n   135\u2192\\t}\\n   136\u2192\\n   137\u2192\\tlogger := klog.FromContext(ctx)\\n   138\u2192\\n   139\u2192\\tcm.topologyManager = topologymanager.NewFakeManager()\\n   140\u2192\\tcm.cpuManager = cpumanager.NewFakeManager(logger)\\n   141\u2192\\tcm.memoryManager = memorymanager.NewFakeManager(logger)\\n   142\u2192\\n   143\u2192\\tif utilfeature.DefaultFeatureGate.Enabled(kubefeatures.WindowsCPUAndMemoryAffinity) {\\n   144\u2192\\t\\tlogger.Info(\\\"Creating topology manager\\\")\\n   145\u2192\\t\\tcm.topologyManager, err = topologymanager.NewManager(machineInfo.Topology,\\n   146\u2192\\t\\t\\tnodeConfig.TopologyManagerPolicy,\\n   147\u2192\\t\\t\\tnodeConfig.TopologyManagerScope,\\n   148\u2192\\t\\t\\tnodeConfig.TopologyManagerPolicyOptions)\\n   149\u2192\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n   150\u2192\\t\\t\\tlogger.Error(err, \\\"Failed to initialize topology manager\\\")\\n   151\u2192\\t\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n   152\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   153\u2192\\n   154\u2192\\t\\tlogger.Info(\\\"Creating cpu manager\\\")\\n   155\u2192\\t\\tcm.cpuManager, err = cpumanager.NewManager(\\n   156\u2192\\t\\t\\tlogger,\\n   157\u2192\\t\\t\\tnodeConfig.CPUManagerPolicy,\\n   158\u2192\\t\\t\\tnodeConfig.CPUManagerPolicyOptions,\\n   159\u2192\\t\\t\\tnodeConfig.CPUManagerReconcilePeriod,\\n   160\u2192\\t\\t\\tmachineInfo,\\n   161\u2192\\t\\t\\tnodeConfig.NodeAllocatableConfig.ReservedSystemCPUs,\\n   162\u2192\\t\\t\\tcm.GetNodeAllocatableReservation(),\\n   163\u2192\\t\\t\\tnodeConfig.KubeletRootDir,\\n   164\u2192\\t\\t\\tcm.topologyManager,\\n   165\u2192\\t\\t)\\n   166\u2192\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n   167\u2192\\t\\t\\tlogger.Error(err, \\\"Failed to initialize cpu manager\\\")\\n   168\u2192\\t\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n   169\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   170\u2192\\t\\tcm.topologyManager.AddHintProvider(logger, cm.cpuManager)\\n   171\u2192\\n   172\u2192\\t\\tlogger.Info(\\\"Creating memory manager\\\")\\n   173\u2192\\t\\tcm.memoryManager, err = memorymanager.NewManager(\\n   174\u2192\\t\\t\\tlogger,\\n   175\u2192\\t\\t\\tnodeConfig.MemoryManagerPolicy,\\n   176\u2192\\t\\t\\tmachineInfo,\\n   177\u2192\\t\\t\\tcm.GetNodeAllocatableReservation(),\\n   178\u2192\\t\\t\\tnodeConfig.MemoryManagerReservedMemory,\\n   179\u2192\\t\\t\\tnodeConfig.KubeletRootDir,\\n   180\u2192\\t\\t\\tcm.topologyManager,\\n   181\u2192\\t\\t)\\n   182\u2192\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n   183\u2192\\t\\t\\tlogger.Error(err, \\\"Failed to initialize memory manager\\\")\\n   184\u2192\\t\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n   185\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   186\u2192\\t\\tcm.topologyManager.AddHintProvider(logger, cm.memoryManager)\\n   187\u2192\\t}\\n   188\u2192\\n   189\u2192\\tlogger.Info(\\\"Creating device plugin manager\\\")\\n   190\u2192\\tcm.deviceManager, err = devicemanager.NewManagerImpl(nil, cm.topologyManager)\\n   191\u2192\\tif err != nil {\\n   192\u2192\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n   193\u2192\\t}\\n   194\u2192\\tcm.topologyManager.AddHintProvider(logger, cm.deviceManager)\\n   195\u2192\\n   196\u2192\\treturn cm, nil\\n   197\u2192}\\n   198\u2192\\n   199\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) SystemCgroupsLimit() v1.ResourceList {\\n   200\u2192\\treturn v1.ResourceList{}\\n   201\u2192}\\n   202\u2192\\n   203\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) GetNodeConfig() NodeConfig {\\n GetNodeAllocatableReservation() v1.ResourceList {\\n   226\u2192\\tevictionReservation := hardEvictionReservation(cm.nodeConfig.HardEvictionThresholds, cm.capacity)\\n   227\u2192\\tresult := make(v1.ResourceList)\\n   228\u2192\\tfor k := range cm.capacity {\\n   229\u2192\\t\\tvalue := resource.NewQuantity(0, resource.DecimalSI)\\n   230\u2192\\t\\tif cm.nodeConfig.SystemReserved != nil {\\n   231\u2192\\t\\t\\tvalue.Add(cm.nodeConfig.SystemReserved[k])\\n   232\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   233\u2192\\t\\tif cm.nodeConfig.KubeReserved != nil {\\n   234\u2192\\t\\t\\tvalue.Add(cm.nodeConfig.KubeReserved[k])\\n   235\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   236\u2192\\t\\tif evictionReservation != nil {\\n   237\u2192\\t\\t\\tvalue.Add(evictionReservation[k])\\n   238\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   239\u2192\\t\\tif !value.IsZero() {\\n   240\u2192\\t\\t\\tresult[k] = *value\\n   241\u2192\\t\\t}\\n   242\u2192\\t}\\n   243\u2192\\treturn result\\n   244\u2192}\\n   245\u2192\\n   246\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) GetCapacity(localStorageCapacityIsolation bool) v1.ResourceList {\\n   247\u2192\\treturn cm.capacity\\n   248\u2192}\\n   249\u2192\\n 252\u2192\\treturn map[string]cache.PluginHandler{pluginwatcherapi.DevicePlugin: cm.deviceManager.GetWatcherHandler()}\\n   253\u2192}\\n   254\u2192\\n   255\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) 263\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) NewPodContainerManager() PodContainerManager {\\n   264\u2192\\treturn &podContainerManagerStub{}\\n   265\u2192}\\n   266\u2192\\n   267\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) GetResources(ctx context.Context, pod *v1.Pod, container *v1.Container) (*kubecontainer.RunContainerOptions, error) {\\n   268\u2192\\topts := &kubecontainer.RunContainerOptions{}\\n   269\u2192\\t// Allocate should already be called during predicateAdmitHandler.Admit(),\\n   270\u2192\\t// just try to fetch device runtime information from cached state here\\n   271\u2192\\tdevOpts, err := cm.deviceManager.GetDeviceRunContainerOptions(ctx, pod, container)\\n   272\u2192\\tif err != nil {\\n   273\u2192\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n   274\u2192\\t} else if devOpts == nil {\\n   275\u2192\\t\\treturn opts, nil\\n   276\u2192\\t}\\n   277\u2192\\topts.Devices = append(opts.Devices, devOpts.Devices...)\\n   278\u2192\\topts.Mounts = append(opts.Mounts, devOpts.Mounts...)\\n   279\u2192\\topts.Envs = append(opts.Envs, devOpts.Envs...)\\n   280\u2192\\topts.Annotations = append(opts.Annotations, devOpts.Annotations...)\\n   281\u2192\\treturn opts, nil\\n   282\u2192}\\n   283\u2192\\n   284\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) UpdateAllocatedResourcesStatus(pod *v1.Pod, status *v1.PodStatus) {\\n   285\u2192\\t// For {\\n   293\u2192\\t// TODO(SergeyKanzhelev, https://kep.k8s.io/4680): add support for DRA resources, for now only use device plugin updates\\n   294\u2192\\treturn cm.deviceManager.Updates()\\n   295\u2192}\\n   296\u2192\\n   297\u2192func (cm *containerManagerImpl) UpdatePluginResources(node *schedulerframework.NodeInfo, attrs *lifecycle.PodAdmitAttributes) error {\\n   298\u2192\\treturn
